caption: Two men in business attire are seated at a table against a dark background featuring light blue and white branding. On the left, a man wears a dark blazer over a light-colored shirt, while the man on the right wears a grey suit jacket, a white shirt, and a blue tie. A silver laptop and a notepad are on the table between them. The background displays logos for "theCUBE" and hashtags including "#BigData" and "#BigDataDV". A small sign on the table reads "SPONSORED BY INFO-OBJECTS". Throughout the sequence, the man on the left is gesturing with both hands while speaking, moving his arms from a wide position toward the center. The man on the right listens attentively, maintaining a relatively still posture while looking toward the first man. The scene remains static in terms of camera angle and environment as the conversation progresses.
